title: NIT Trichy Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview Project Assistant Posts
description: National Institute of Technology (NIT) Trichy has announced the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Project Assistant Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech, Diploma in Civil Engineering can grab this chance and apply for the NIT Trichy Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
